issues.description: First effect missing complete SearchDeck filter logic. Should specify: type includes 'Whitebeard Pirates', exclude [Izo], look at top 5 cards, reveal up to 1, place rest at bottom in any order. Current filter is 'Any' with no parameters.

Second effect trigger is 'OnAttacked' but card text says '[On Your Opponent's Attack]'. OnAttacked means this card was attacked; opponent's attack is a broader event. Should use 'Trigger' with proper condition, or reinterpret as 'OnAttack' from opponent perspective.
Second effect is missing: (1) optional cost to trash this Character, (2) the action to place 1 card from hand at bottom of deck. Currently only has DrawCard.
